## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between RunPod and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, site audit findings, and next steps for SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on two content clusters: deployment guides and RentGPU](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Site audit revealed minimal issues; orphan pages and sitemap inconsistencies to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [New article template for RunGPU comparisons created, aiming to compete with high-ranking competitors](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [AI-driven traffic is significant, driving 500-1000 activations per month](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Two main content clusters: deployment guides and RentGPU](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Randomized titles for variety (e.g., "Deploy in seconds on RunPod", "Affordable on-demand cloud access with RunPod")](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Five articles approved for the week, testing new workflows](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Content OS updated with new statuses (article generation, review, revisions, ready to stage)](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Webflow migration expected by end of month; interim solution for article uploads in place](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### Site Audit Findings

  - [Minimal issues found; site is clean and fast](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Orphan pages identified, mainly for paid ad landing pages and comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Recommendation to create a structure for comparison pages (e.g., /compare or nested under existing categories)](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Some links on the website not included in the sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Meta description improvements suggested but not critical](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Focus on replicating success of Hyperstack's high-ranking article on cloud GPU providers](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Key factors: listicle format, internal links, keyword density (AI, training, fine-tuning, inference, machine learning)](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Short paragraphs after headings beneficial for AI overviews and LLM mentions](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Deep dive into own product (Hyperstack) noted as effective despite being unconventional](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### Content Distribution

  - [Blog posts shared on LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and email](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [No current strategy for distributing articles from the "articles" section](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Consideration needed for promoting listicles and comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### New RunGPU Template

  - [Template added to database with specific URL structure suggestion](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [More landing page-style format proposed](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Includes tables and additional comments for review](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney and Jason to tune workflow for generating RentGPU articles](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Create article mimicking Hyperstack's successful cloud GPU providers comparison](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Emmett to review and provide feedback on new RunGPU template](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Address orphan pages by creating a structure for comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Review and update sitemap to include all relevant links](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Continue with Webflow migration, aiming for completion by end of month](https://fathom.video/share/syCg68PmuxZrbweyjr8QwmMNJvxKPwhS?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
